summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. The hydrated preflight artifact shows no security-sensitive items and no shared canonical. Close, merge, fix, and raise-pr paths are disabled or unsafe for this shard, so each open PR is kept open or routed to targeted human review for the unresolved maintainer/technical decision.

actions.reason: Focused browser bug-fix PR with proof/technical review still outstanding; it is not duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or security-sensitive, so keep it open as an independent PR.
Maintainer technical decision is needed on a focused P1 Codex/message-delivery fix that appears ready for review but cannot be merged or repaired by this job.
Draft focused compatibility PR is blocked on proof and author/maintainer follow-up, but should stay open rather than be closed in this inventory shard.
Maintainer/author decision is needed on the unresolved ClawSweeper changes request for a message-delivery parser feature.
Maintainer decision is needed because this PR has active author follow-up, prior maintainer signal, and unresolved review status in a user-facing channel formatting path.
